$jsonSchema.title: interventions
$jsonSchema.description: Therapeutic interventions administered within a trial arm. Each intervention belongs to exactly one trial and one arm — it has no clinical meaning without that context. Stored as a separate collection (not embedded in trials) because interventions are independently queried by AR-05, AR-09, and AR-10, and adverse events reference them directly.

trial_id.description: Reference to the trial this intervention belongs to. Every intervention must be scoped to exactly one trial.

arm_label.description: The arm within the trial that this intervention is assigned to. Must match an arm_label in the parent trial's arms array. Critical for the indirect AE-to-arm lookup path.

name.description: Generic or brand name. E.g. Pembrolizumab, Placebo saline.

mechanism.description: Short description of how the intervention works. E.g. PD-1 checkpoint inhibitor.

dosage.description: Dosage details. Embedded because dosage is a 1:1 attribute inseparable from the intervention.

amount.description: Numeric dosage amount. Null if not applicable (e.g. cell therapies).

frequency.description: How often the intervention is administered.

target_gene.description: HGNC gene symbol targeted by this intervention. E.g. EGFR, BRCA1, TP53. Null if not applicable (e.g. placebos).

target_protein.description: UniProt-style protein name targeted. E.g. Programmed cell death protein 1 (PD-1). Null if not applicable.

regulatory_status.description: Current regulatory classification of the intervention.
